LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneral.description: [PAWN_nameDef] coordinated Operation: Deadlife from a buried continuity bunker, convinced that a ruined world could still be ruled if the right people endured below. When the bombs fell, [PAWN_pronoun] sealed the command complex, rationed the survivors, and kept issuing orders long after the chain of command had died. Radiation, age, and emergency preservation treatments left [PAWN_objective] a thinking ghoul in dress uniform, half sustained by medicine and half by obsession. [PAWN_pronoun] still waits in the control room, ready to finish the final launch order.
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneral.title: the overseer
